transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: It absolves the reader and attributes the problem to conditioning, yet surrounds that reassurance with disgust, catastrophic health imagery, absolute causal and cure claims, compulsory compliance, and unsupported success testimony. Across chapters, it otherwise maintains a belief-change-to-abstinence sequence.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It duplicates A throughout, so it carries the same compassionate trap framing, humiliating and frightening rhetoric, medical certainty, unverified authority claims, strict compliance demands, and internally stable promise that changed beliefs will dissolve desire.

parsed.generic_mechanism: No difference mechanism is supported: identical framing, evidence, and instruction structure engage the same evaluative criteria.
